title: Vote security, SSR auth foundation and audit fixes

transitions.note: Audit fixes implemented; typecheck/lint/test green. Awaiting build, docs:check, commit and deploy.

Audit/stabilization pass: docs:check now compares planSync() not just markers; applyMarker preserves CRLF/LF (no false dry-run drift); /api/vote docs drop anonymousSessionId; V055-01 path fixed to .mjs; migration 20260616120000_harden_vote_rpc_execute_privileges grants execute->service_role + votes table privileges (RPC kept security definer); schema:check extended to verify the vote RPC privilege property. Verified locally: typecheck, lint, test, docs:check. build BLOCKED (no .env.local secrets); schema:check needs SUPABASE_DB_URL. Not committed yet.

notes: Closes audit nuances: server-authoritative vote identity via @supabase/ssr, middleware session refresh, vote rate-limit, atomic cast_best_vote RPC, route error/loading/not-found boundaries, removal of the already-documented-as-removed /arena-voting alias, and a Node .nvmrc pin. Full v0.6 features (profile, avatars, OAuth, model access levels, guest cards) remain deferred.
